title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Schoolnet India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Schoolnet India family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Schoolnet India:
Schoolnet India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schoolnet India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
